rows.command_eng: Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.
rows.output: {"name":"Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door","cron":"0 0 * * *","period":0,"code":"if ((#Door).doorcontrol_door == \"closed\") { (#Door).door_close() } else { (#Door).door_open() }"}

rows.command_eng: Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.
rows.output: {"name":"Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve","cron":"0 13-15 * * *","period":300000,"code":"if ((#Clock).clock_hour >= 13) { if ((#Clock).clock_hour < 15) { if ((#Valve).valve_valvestate == false) { (#Valve).valve_open() } else { (#Valve).valve_close() } } else { break } } else { break }"}
